=== Environment Info ===

Docker image:    grafana/grafana:11.4.0
Container name:  grafana-h6-poc
Host port:       3001 -> 3000

Configuration injected:
  GF_AUTH_PROXY_ENABLED=true
  GF_AUTH_PROXY_HEADER_NAME=X-WEBAUTH-USER
  GF_AUTH_PROXY_AUTO_SIGN_UP=true
  GF_AUTH_PROXY_WHITELIST=  (empty — the vulnerable default)

Host platform:   darwin (macOS)
Docker version:  28.5.2
Date:            2026-04-11

Grafana server response (/api/health):
  {"database":"ok","version":"11.4.0","commit":"b58701869e1a11b696010a6f28bd96b68a2cf0d0"}

Vulnerable code path:
  pkg/services/authn/clients/proxy.go:200-202
  pkg/services/authn/clients/proxy.go:220-224
